text: Francis Mistica is a Fullstack Developer.
Francis Mistica is also known by the alias FNMM.
Francis Mistica's contact email is francismistica06@gmail.com.
Francis Mistica's GitHub profile can be found at https://github.com/Kiko915.
Francis Mistica's LinkedIn profile is located at https://www.linkedin.com/in/devkaiko/.
Francis Mistica's Instagram profile is https://www.instagram.com/misticafrancis/.
Francis Mistica's YouTube channel is https://www.youtube.com/kikcodes
Francis Mistica enjoys Music as a hobby.
Francis Mistica enjoys Walking as a hobby.
Francis Mistica is passionate about Matcha, and mentions that matcha sparks his ideas.
Francis Mistica likes watching Movies as a hobby.
Francis Mistica enjoys Reading as a hobby.
Francis Mistica plays Mobile Games as a hobby.
Francis Mistica likes Tinkering and experimenting as a hobby.
Francis Mistica has 6 years of experience in development.
Francis Mistica is highly passionate about development and technology.
Francis Mistica loves bringing digital projects to life.
Francis Mistica is currently studying as a Computer Science student.
Francis Mistica started building commercial web projects in 2020.
Francis Mistica's tech journey began at age 6 when he discovered computers and the internet, sparking a lifelong fascination with technology.
In 2021, Francis Mistica pursued a STEM strand and built his first website using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, which made him fall in love with web development.
Currently, in 2025, Francis Mistica is a 3rd-year Computer Science student collaborating with classmates on various software projects.
Francis Mistica embraces the maker spirit: learning, experimenting, and creating new things to bring innovative ideas to life.
LargaNa! is a trip estimator app developed by Francis Mistica to help users plan travel time.
LargaNa! is an app created by Francis Mistica for estimating travel time so users will not be late.
Dadj Auto Shop Management System is a web application built by Francis Mistica to streamline auto repair operations.
Francis Mistica created the Dadj Auto Shop Management System using Vue.js, PostgreSQL, and Tailwind to manage inventory and service orders.
Kaiko's Christmas is an AI-powered greeting generator built by Francis Mistica to create personalized holiday messages.
Francis Mistica developed Kaiko's Christmas using React and Firebase to spread holiday cheer with AI-generated greetings.
LND Credly is a centralized database platform created by Francis Mistica for the LND community to manage certificates.
Built with React and Next.js, LND Credly is a web app by Francis Mistica that showcases Lingkod Ng Dambana community achievements and badges.
The LND Official Website was built by Francis Mistica using Astro to facilitate events and workshops for the ministry community.
Francis Mistica developed the official community platform for LND to connect members and organize mentoring sessions.
TechTerview is a platform designed by Francis Mistica to help developers ace technical interviews through mock interviews.
Francis Mistica built TechTerview with React, Next.js, and TypeScript to provide coding challenges and interview resources.
